description_long: This object is a compact, circular smoke alarm with a low-profile design, typically found in residential or commercial interiors. The main body is smooth and slightly domed, with a series of evenly spaced vent holes arranged in a circular pattern on the face, allowing air to flow into the sensing chamber. The perimeter of the device is clean and unadorned, with no visible buttons or switches from most angles. The underside is flat, designed for flush mounting against a ceiling or wall. The color is predominantly white or light gray, which helps it blend unobtrusively into most environments. There are no visible brand labels, indicator lights, or test buttons on the exterior.
description: A compact, circular smoke alarm with a smooth, vented face and a low-profile, white or light gray body. Designed for flush mounting on ceilings or walls.
description_view_0: The smoke alarm is seen edge-on, showing its thin, circular profile with no visible surface details.
description_view_1: The top view reveals the circular face with evenly spaced vent holes, highlighting the grill pattern.
description_view_2: Another edge-on view, similar to view 0, showing the slim profile and clean perimeter.
description_view_3: The bottom view displays the flat mounting surface and the arrangement of vent holes on the face.
